title: Create: Geography
description: use geography to change the world
body:
Create: Geography

Create: Geography embraces the iconic style of Create to simulate diverse geological processes, introducing new materials and seamlessly blending the natural world with automated production for an immersive geological adventure.

Features
Natural Transform

Experience dynamic geological phenomena like salinization and soil freezing that naturally transform the game world, enriching your gameplay. Unlike mods that simply spawn ores, Create: Geography preserves world generation and uses natural transform mechanisms to let players engage deeply with geology’s wonders.


![nature transform](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5b8992a2f5bb985f007f0cc7ee6f1243da0fc86_0.webp)
New Materials & Recipes

Leverage Create’s mechanics to decompose and recombine materials, unlocking unique geological minerals such as hornblende and pyroxene. These additions enable the creation of diverse, sophisticated production lines.
![materials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c1b7b397d26a198fb8770ce042decca6bf2fc4b_0.webp)
Future Plans

We aim to expand Create: Geography by exploring geological themes in agriculture, polar glaciers, volcanic hot springs, and solar energy, while introducing more functional mineral components to deepen gameplay.

Join Create: Geography and uncover the Earth’s secrets through the beauty of create!
